top.title: BBC visits aftermath of Israeli strike on Lebanon that killed family as IDF targets Hezbollah
top.summary: A relative tells BBC those killed were civilians and not Hezbollah operatives, but the Israel Defense Forces says it was targeting "terrorist infrastructure".

top.title: Zelensky accuses EU allies of 'blackmail' in oil pipeline row
top.summary: Volodymyr Zelensky says restoring the flow of Russian oil via Ukraine into the EU would be like lifting sanctions on Russia.

top.title: Severe flooding kills 62 in Kenya, as heavy rains continue
top.summary: Eleven people were rescued overnight after a minibus taxi got stuck in rising floodwaters in Nairobi.

top.title: Games with loot boxes to get minimum 16 age rating across Europe
top.summary: The new changes by the Pan-European Game Information age-ratings body (PEGI) will start from June.

top.title: AI toys for children misread emotions and respond inappropriately, researchers warn
top.summary: In first study of its kind, Cambridge researchers found AI toys could misread some children's emotions.

top.title: Grammarly pulls AI author-impersonation tool after backlash
top.summary: Writers criticised the feature which used their names and styles as "AI personas" without consent.

title.#text: Samsung’s Galaxy Buds 4 Pro are the choice — if you have a Galaxy phone
The fast rise and epic fall of Clubhouse
